questions.stem: Under ASC 815, which of the following characteristics must a financial instrument possess to be classified as a derivative?

choices.label: A
choices.text: It must be exchange-traded

choices.label: B
choices.text: It has an underlying and a notional amount, requires no or small initial net investment, and can be net settled

choices.label: C
choices.text: It must have a maturity of more than one year

choices.label: D
choices.text: It must be denominated in a foreign currency

questions.explanation: ASC 815-10-15-83 defines a derivative as an instrument that: (1) has one or more underlyings and one or more notional amounts, (2) requires no initial net investment or a small one relative to other contracts with similar responses to market factors, and (3) its terms require or permit net settlement. Exchange-trading is not required.
questions.explanationJa: デリバティブの定義要件は3つ：(1) 1つ以上の基礎数値（underlying）と想定元本を有する、(2) 当初純投資が不要または少額、(3) 差金決済が可能。取引所取引であることは要件ではない。

questions.stem: A company designates a derivative as a fair value hedge of a recognized asset. Under ASC 815, how are gains and losses on the hedging instrument reported?

choices.label: A
choices.text: In other comprehensive income (OCI)

choices.label: B
choices.text: In earnings, along with the offsetting gain/loss on the hedged item attributable to the hedged risk

choices.label: C
choices.text: Deferred until the hedged item is sold

choices.label: D
choices.text: As an adjustment to the hedging instrument's notional amount

questions.explanation: Under ASC 815-25-35-1, for a fair value hedge, both the gain/loss on the hedging derivative and the offsetting loss/gain on the hedged item (attributable to the hedged risk) are recognized in current earnings. This provides offset in the income statement, reducing earnings volatility from the hedged risk.
questions.explanationJa: 公正価値ヘッジでは、ヘッジ手段（デリバティブ）の損益とヘッジ対象のヘッジリスクに帰属する相殺損益の両方を当期損益に認識する。損益計算書上で相殺が生じ、ヘッジリスクによる収益変動が軽減される。

questions.stem: On January 1, a company enters into an interest rate swap designated as a cash flow hedge of variable-rate debt. At December 31, the swap has a fair value gain of $80,000. The hedge is 100% effective. What amount is reported in other comprehensive income (OCI)?
questions.explanation: Under ASC 815-30-35-3, for a perfectly effective cash flow hedge, the entire gain or loss on the hedging derivative is initially reported in OCI (accumulated other comprehensive income). It is reclassified from AOCI to earnings in the period(s) when the hedged forecasted transaction affects earnings. Since the hedge is 100% effective, the full $80,000 goes to OCI.
questions.explanationJa: 完全に有効なキャッシュフローヘッジでは、ヘッジ手段の損益全額をまずOCIに計上する。ヘッジ対象の予定取引が損益に影響する期間にAOCIから損益へ振り替える。本問ではヘッジが100%有効なので、$80,000全額がOCIに計上される。

questions.stem: A company has a cash flow hedge. The cumulative change in the hedging derivative's fair value is a $120,000 gain. The cumulative change in the present value of expected cash flows on the hedged item is a $100,000 loss. What is reported in earnings for hedge ineffectiveness?
questions.explanation: Under ASC 815-30-35-3, the effective portion of a cash flow hedge ($100,000) is recorded in OCI. The ineffective portion (the excess of derivative gain over hedged item change) = $120,000 − $100,000 = $20,000 is recognized immediately in earnings. Only over-hedging creates an immediate earnings charge; under-hedging has no ineffectiveness recognized.
questions.explanationJa: キャッシュフローヘッジの有効部分（$100,000）はOCIに計上する。非有効部分 = デリバティブ利益の超過額 = $120,000 - $100,000 = $20,000は即時に損益認識する。オーバーヘッジのみ即時損益計上となり、アンダーヘッジでは非有効部分を認識しない。

questions.stem: A company issues a $10,000,000 fixed-rate bond and enters into a receive-fixed/pay-variable interest rate swap to hedge the fair value risk. At year-end, interest rates have risen, causing the bond's fair value to decrease by $250,000 and the swap's fair value to increase by $240,000. What is the net effect on earnings from this hedge?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Loss of $10,000

choices.label: B
choices.text: Gain of $240,000

choices.label: C
choices.text: Loss of $250,000

questions.explanation: In a fair value hedge, both the derivative gain/loss and the hedged item's offsetting loss/gain are in earnings. Swap gain = $240,000; Bond fair value loss (attributable to hedged risk) = $250,000. Net earnings effect = $240,000 gain − $250,000 loss = $10,000 net loss. This $10,000 represents hedge ineffectiveness.
questions.explanationJa: 公正価値ヘッジでは、デリバティブの損益とヘッジ対象の相殺損益の両方を損益計上する。スワップ利益 = $240,000、社債公正価値損失（ヘッジリスク帰属）= $250,000。損益への純影響 = $240,000 - $250,000 = -$10,000（純損失）。この$10,000がヘッジ非有効部分である。

questions.stem: A company purchases a call option on 10,000 shares at a strike price of $50 for a premium of $30,000. It does not designate the option as a hedge. At year-end, the option has a fair value of $45,000. What is the effect on Year 1 earnings?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Gain of $15,000

choices.label: B
choices.text: No effect until the option is exercised

choices.label: C
choices.text: Loss of $30,000

choices.label: D
choices.text: Gain of $45,000

questions.explanation: Under ASC 815-10-35-2, derivatives not designated as hedging instruments are measured at fair value with changes in fair value recognized in current earnings. The option was purchased for $30,000 and its fair value at year-end is $45,000. Gain = $45,000 − $30,000 = $15,000, recognized in earnings.
questions.explanationJa: ヘッジ指定のないデリバティブは公正価値で測定し、変動額を当期損益に認識する。オプション購入額$30,000、年末公正価値$45,000。利益 = $45,000 - $30,000 = $15,000を損益計上する。

questions.stem: A U.S. parent company designates a forward contract as a hedge of its net investment in a foreign subsidiary. The forward contract has a gain of $150,000 at year-end. Where is this gain reported?

choices.label: A
choices.text: In earnings as foreign exchange gain

choices.label: B
choices.text: In the cumulative translation adjustment (CTA) within OCI

choices.label: C
choices.text: As an adjustment to goodwill

choices.label: D
choices.text: As a reduction of the investment in subsidiary

questions.explanation: Under ASC 815-35-35-1, for a hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation, the effective portion of the hedging instrument's gain or loss is reported in the cumulative translation adjustment (CTA) component of other comprehensive income, the same location as the translation gain/loss on the net investment. It remains in AOCI until the subsidiary is sold or liquidated.
questions.explanationJa: 在外事業体への純投資ヘッジでは、ヘッジ手段の有効部分の損益をOCIの為替換算調整勘定（CTA）に計上する。これは純投資自体の換算損益と同じ区分である。子会社の売却・清算時までAOCIに留まる。

questions.stem: A company issues a bond with a conversion feature that allows the holder to convert into common stock. Under ASC 815-15, when must the conversion feature be bifurcated and accounted for separately as a derivative?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Always, for all convertible bonds

choices.label: B
choices.text: Only when the embedded derivative is not clearly and closely related to the host contract and the host is not measured at fair value through earnings

choices.label: C
choices.text: Never; conversion features are always part of the host

choices.label: D
choices.text: Only if the bond is issued at a discount

questions.explanation: ASC 815-15-25-1 requires bifurcation of an embedded derivative when: (1) the economic characteristics of the embedded derivative are not clearly and closely related to the host contract, (2) the hybrid instrument is not remeasured at fair value with changes in fair value reported in earnings, and (3) a separate instrument with the same terms would meet the definition of a derivative. An equity conversion feature in an equity-host is clearly and closely related and thus not bifurcated.
questions.explanationJa: 組込デリバティブの分離（bifurcation）が必要な3条件：(1) 組込部分の経済的特性がホスト契約と明確かつ密接に関連しない、(2) 混合商品が公正価値で再測定されていない、(3) 同条件の独立商品がデリバティブの定義を満たす。株式ホストにおける株式転換条項はホストと密接に関連するため分離不要である。

questions.stem: A company used a cash flow hedge to hedge a forecasted inventory purchase. $60,000 of gain was accumulated in AOCI related to this hedge. The inventory is purchased and subsequently sold to customers. When is the $60,000 reclassified from AOCI to earnings?

choices.label: A
choices.text: When the inventory is purchased

choices.label: B
choices.text: When the inventory is sold (affects cost of goods sold)

choices.label: C
choices.text: Ratably over the inventory holding period

choices.label: D
choices.text: Immediately when the hedge is discontinued

questions.explanation: Under ASC 815-30-35-38, amounts in AOCI are reclassified to earnings in the period(s) the hedged forecasted transaction affects earnings. For a hedged inventory purchase, the AOCI amount adjusts the basis of the inventory and flows to cost of goods sold when the inventory is sold—that is when it affects earnings.
questions.explanationJa: AOCIの金額はヘッジ対象の予定取引が損益に影響する期間に振り替える。在庫購入のヘッジでは、AOCI累計額が在庫の取得原価を調整し、在庫販売時に売上原価として損益に反映される。

questions.stem: On October 1, a U.S. company enters a 90-day forward contract to sell €500,000 at a forward rate of $1.12/€. On December 31, the spot rate is $1.10/€ and the fair value of the forward contract (for the remaining 30 days) is determined to be a gain of $9,800. If the forward is not designated as a hedge, what is the journal entry at December 31?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Debit Forward Contract Asset $9,800; Credit Foreign Exchange Gain $9,800

choices.label: B
choices.text: Debit Foreign Exchange Loss $9,800; Credit Forward Contract Liability $9,800

choices.label: C
choices.text: No entry until settlement

choices.label: D
choices.text: Debit Forward Contract Asset $10,000; Credit Foreign Exchange Gain $10,000

questions.explanation: Under ASC 815-10-35-2, derivatives not designated as hedges are marked to fair value at each reporting date with gains/losses in earnings. The forward contract to sell euros has gained value because the euro weakened (spot $1.10 < forward $1.12), meaning the company will sell at a rate above market. Fair value gain of $9,800 is recognized: Dr Forward Contract Asset, Cr Foreign Exchange Gain.
questions.explanationJa: ヘッジ指定のないデリバティブは各報告日に公正価値で評価し損益に計上する。ユーロ売りの先渡契約は、ユーロ下落（スポット$1.10 < 先渡レート$1.12）により価値が上昇した。公正価値利益$9,800を認識する。仕訳：借方 先渡契約資産 $9,800 / 貸方 為替差益 $9,800。
